description_long: This hatchback car features a rugged, off-road inspired design with a yellow and black color scheme. The vehicle has large, deeply treaded tires suitable for rough terrain, and a reinforced frame with exposed structural elements. The roof is flat and black, supported by a visible roll cage, and the sides are partially open with mesh panels for added safety. The front end is angular with pronounced fenders and a distinctive grille, while the rear showcases visible suspension components and a robust bumper. The interior includes two bucket seats and a simple dashboard, emphasizing functionality over luxury. The overall appearance suggests a vehicle built for both urban and off-road environments, blending utility with a sporty aesthetic.
description: A yellow and black hatchback car with large off-road tires, exposed frame, and a rugged, sporty design. Features include a roll cage, mesh side panels, and visible suspension.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the angular front fenders, grille, and open side with visible seats.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the large rear tires, exposed suspension, and mesh side panel.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the rear bumper, suspension components, and the open structure of the car.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the open cabin, roll cage, and the pronounced front and rear fenders.
